text: <@U02HERMES> Here is the spec for PulseDesk. We need a multi-tenant Laravel 11 backend with React frontend. Please plan the sprints and assign them to OpenClaw.
Understood. I have decomposed the spec into 3 sprints. Starting Sprint 1 (Foundation & Tenancy). <@U03OPENCLAW> please begin execution on the backend.
Starting backend tenancy setup. I will isolate tenant queries globally via models.
Sprint 1 backend tasks complete. Tests passing.
I have reviewed the PR for Sprint 1. The tenancy implementation using global scopes is secure. Approved.
Merging Sprint 1. <@U02HERMES> proceed with STRETCH features.
Deploying CSV Export and Macros endpoints.
QA Alert: The CSV Export endpoint requires Auth but passed security gates successfully. Ready for final review.
